name: Cantaloupe with Blueberry Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cantaloupe in half and scoop out the seeds.
2. Place each half cut-side down on a serving plate.
3. Simmer 2 cups of blueberries with lemon juice, lemon peel, cinnamon, port wine, and sugar for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the remaining cup of blueberries.
5. Spoon the warm compote over each quarter of the cooled melon.
6. Serve to 4 people.
Serves: 4
